productDisplayName: Doodle Kids Boy Washed Blue Jeans
description: Composition Navy blue denims that have a buttoned closure, elasticated waist, two side pockets with one change pocket, two back pockets with stitch detailing, badge on the right thigh and belt loops on the waist Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry low Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations His cuteness level will be off the chart when you dress your little boy in these denims from doodle. Team this with a T-shirt and sandals, and let your little one play in comfort.
